description: This is a Java service class named DefectService that manages defect records in a defect tracking system. It provides methods for retrieving, listing with filtering, creating, updating, and deleting defects, as well as linking user references to defects.

classes.name: DefectService
classes.description: Service class that handles business logic related to defect management, including CRUD operations and filtering.

methods.name: getOrThrow
methods.description: Retrieves a defect by ID or throws a 404 error if not found.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Returns a filtered paginated list of defects based on severity, status, date range, or search query.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new defect and links user references based on IDs.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates an existing defect with new data and linked users.

methods.name: linkUsers
methods.description: Associates user entities with a defect based on user IDs, throwing exceptions if user IDs are invalid.
